chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4572 of 2021 Muhammad Kanad @ Mamoo Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on Misc. No.18819/21 2. For orders on office objection No.1, 6 and 26. 3. For orders on Misc. No.18820/21 4. For hearing of main case Dated: 30.07.2021 Mr. Zubair Ali Khaskheli for petitioner. -.-.- This matter pertains to a land, which is allegedly owned by the petitioner. Private respondents are claimed to have been causing harassment to the petitioner in respect of the land in question. The controversy, which is subject matter of this petition, is such that it cannot be addressed in these proceedings under Article 199of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. If petitioner has any grievance in respect of title of the land in question, he may pursue his remedy before the Court having jurisdiction including but not limited to Civil Court. Petition being misconceived is dismissed along with listed applications. Judge Judge
